narrative:
Willoughby municipal court district has 60,565 registered voters, with 56.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.5 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean +2.3% D−R vs -0.7% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
